category_sources: source_facts.description says it is an open source general-purpose policy engine; official docs at https://www.openpolicyagent.org/docs/latest describe OPA as a general-purpose policy engine.
display_name_sources: Official documentation uses Open Policy Agent (OPA) at https://www.openpolicyagent.org/docs/latest; source_facts.name is opa.
docs_sources: Official Open Policy Agent documentation provides latest docs, policy language docs, and policy reference at https://www.openpolicyagent.org/docs/latest.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/open-policy-agent/opa, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official docs at https://www.openpolicyagent.org/docs/latest describe OPA, Rego, policy as code, software policy decisions, and CNCF graduated project status.
